task: place the orange fruit in the gray plate
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A blue plate is on a wooden table. An orange fruit is on the table near the plate. The fruit is spherical and has a smooth surface. STRATEGY - First, reach for the orange fruit to grasp it. Then, transport it to the blue plate. Finally, place the fruit on the plate. Failure modes include missing the fruit during grasp or dropping it during transport. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach for the orange fruit at its body. Step 2: Grasp the fruit at its body for a secure hold. Step 3: Transport the fruit to the plate. Step 4: Place the fruit on the plate.**
Goal: on(orange_fruit, blue_plate); stable(orange_fruit)
Scene: orange_fruit, blue_plate, table
Step 1: reach(orange_fruit)
  affordance_region: the body of the orange fruit
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, orange_fruit, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, orange_fruit) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(orange_fruit)
  affordance_region: the body of the orange fruit
  contact: holding(orange_fruit) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(orange_fruit)
Step 3: transport(orange_fruit -> blue_plate)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the blue plate
  spatial: above(orange_fruit, blue_plate, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(orange_fruit)
  done_when: above(orange_fruit, blue_plate, 0.05)
Step 4: place(orange_fruit -> blue_plate)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the blue plate
  contact: surface_contact(orange_fruit, blue_plate) [completion]; released(orange_fruit) [completion]
  pose: stable(orange_fruit) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(orange_fruit, blue_plate) AND released(orange_fruit)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the orange fruit
the body of the orange fruit
an empty area on the blue plate
an empty area on the blue plate
